query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as geotagged, SUM(CASE WHEN mediaType = 'video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as videos, SUM(CASE WHEN mediaType = 'photo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as photos FROM media WHERE projectId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as geotagged, SUM(CASE WHEN mediaType = 'video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as videos, SUM(CASE WHEN mediaType = 'photo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as photos FROM media WHERE projectId = 1;
